summary: Frontend-only testing of single-page Spider-Man themed portfolio for Harsh Bhati. Tested on desktop (1920x1080) and mobile (390x844). All 9 sections render, all data-testid attributes present and unique, all data values match spec (HARSH BHATI title, IIT Indore badge, 6 skill cards, 7 project cards with correct titles, 2 experience items, 3 achievements, 4 positions, all 5 contact items with correct emails/phone/links). Navbar smooth-scroll, active-link underline on scroll, mobile menu open/close, custom cursor follow, scroll-reveal class application, social links and GitHub project links (HBX814, Nova_Rangers, multi-agent-path-planning) all verified. Only minor issue: music play/pause icon does not visually toggle when audio fails (CORS blocked in env) — function does not throw but UI state does not update.

ui_bugs.issue: Audio playback fails due to CORS on both Google Drive primary src and SoundHelix fallback. Because the play() promise rejects, setPlaying(true) is never called, so the button icon stays on fa-play and the widget retains 'paused' class even after click. Per agent_to_agent_context_note, UI state should still toggle even if audio cannot play. Recommend toggling local 'playing' state optimistically (independent of audio.play() success) or using a locally bundled/public CORS-enabled audio file in /app/frontend/public.

action_items: Optional: make music widget UI state toggle independently of audio.play() success so users get visual feedback even when audio source is blocked. Consider hosting a short mp3 in /app/frontend/public/ to avoid third-party CORS issues.
critical_code_review_comments: Portfolio.jsx is 783 lines — consider splitting MusicPlayer, CustomCursor, Navbar, HeroWeb, SpiderWebSVG and DATA constants into separate files under src/components for maintainability (file-size guideline >700 lines).
MusicPlayer toggle silently swallows the play() rejection without surfacing any state change to the user; should either show an error toast or at least toggle the UI playing state.
Audio src points to a Google Drive direct-download URL which is not a stable CORS-enabled audio host; recommend self-hosting the spider theme mp3 in /app/frontend/public/audio/.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Portfolio is a static single-page React app at https://7ee5cdc8-6757-4b98-a765-1272be15d336.preview.emergentagent.com . All sections, nav, project/skill/contact data, mobile menu, scroll-reveal and custom cursor verified working. Only outstanding item is the music toggle visual state when audio source is CORS-blocked (acceptable in test env per request).
verified_features: Page loads, no JS pageerrors (only network/CORS errors from blocked audio fetches)
All 12 testids visible: portfolio-root, navbar, hero/about/skills/projects/experience/achievements/positions/contact sections, footer, music-player-widget
Navbar: 6 nav links + Hire Me CTA visible on desktop
Hero: HARSH BHATI title, B.Tech IIT Indore badge, View Projects + Contact Me CTAs, github/linkedin/email socials with correct hrefs (HBX814, harsh-bhati-451a6930a, harshbhati814@gmail.com)
View Projects CTA scrolls projects section into view (rect.top≈0)
Active nav link updates on scroll (nav-link-skills became active when scrolled to skills)

Projects: 7 cards rendered with correct titles (OperaIQ, CommunityPulse, Drift Detector, Infinite Feed, Virtual Makeup Try-On, SHL Assessment Recommender, Multi-Agent Path Planning). project-link-0/1/6 hrefs correct and target=_blank
Experience: 2 items (ML Research Intern May 2025—Present, Machine Learning Intern Jun—Aug 2025)
Contact: harshbhati814@gmail.com, mems230005017@iiti.ac.in, +91 93512 70751, github.com/HBX814, linkedin.com/in/harsh-bhati-451a6930a all correctly wired
Custom cursor dot + ring elements exist; cursor-dot transform updates with mouse.move
Scroll-reveal: 22/40 .reveal elements gain .visible class after scroll
Mobile (390px): nav-toggle visible, desktop nav links hidden, mobile-menu open class toggles correctly, link click closes menu, no horizontal overflow (scrollWidth=clientWidth=390)
